page_metadata.biotools__summary: AStra is a Python-based software AStra for de novo estimation of the genome-wide aneuploidy profile from raw WGS reads. And  Aneuploidy Spectrum (Digital Karyotyping) for Rapid Authentication of Cell Lines.
